task_titles: Implement student enrollment, progress tracking, and completion certificates generation workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide quiz engine with multiple question types, time limits, and auto-grading.
task_titles: Implement quiz engine with multiple question types workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide discussion forums per course with moderation and notification features.
task_titles: Implement discussion forums per course with moderation and notification features workflow

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide live session integration (Zoom/WebRTC) with recording and attendance tracking.

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should provide learning path builder: prerequisite courses and adaptive progression rules.

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: Actor: Instructor — The Instructor should provide analytics dashboard for instructors: completion rates, quiz scores, engagement.
The system should maintain responsive performance for concurrent users.
The system should adapt to bandwidth (adaptive bitrate, 360p–1080p).
The system should meet accessibility requirements.

risk_signals: External integrations are present and will need interface contracts plus vendor coordination.
Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
2 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: education and learning management.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 7 functional task(s) and 3 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.
assumption_log: Dependency sequencing was inferred for 6 task(s) to produce an executable implementation order beyond the raw prose order.
committee_brief.confidence_signal: Planning confidence is high: no low-confidence tasks were detected in the current plan.
committee_brief.graph_summary: 10 requirements -> 10 atomic tasks across 3 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T008 -> T001 -> T004 (3 hops, ~8 story points, estimated 5 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Optimize concurrent user capacity blocks 6 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 4 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 258 estimated hours | FR: 152h | NFR: 106h.
